calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-28-2010 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2010 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Adequate Responses To Written Discovery Requests And Request For Monetary And Evidentiary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF JANE MARTIN's Motion To Compel Adequate Responses To Written Discovery Requests And Request For Monetary And Evidentiary Sanctions is granted in part as follows:

The motion is granted as to the Special Interrogatories, Defendant is ordered to respond further. The responses in the opposition must be made, served, and verified.

The motion is granted as to the form interrogatories. The responses are incomplete.

As to the Requests For Production, the responses are incomplete as they fail to comply with C.C.P. Section 2031.230.

The responses to the Requests For Admission are adequate. However, the responses to Form Interrogatory 17.1 are incomplete.

Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order.

The court finds that the initial responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $1,140, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Fee paid. Proceedings not reported. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2010 Set For Trial On Oct-18-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-01-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 611
